signal_objectives: rank continuations by repaired packet count
cluster first failures by CRT-locked residue class
identify whether +50 steps escape a stable obstruction menu
notes: This lane is ideal for GPU batching because many tail continuations can be scanned across many n values in parallel.
The first implementation target is batched continuation scoring, not theorem claiming.
The exact objective is to turn the observed repair ladder into a stable structural menu of obstruction packets.
